title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Aman Resorts India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Aman Resorts India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Aman Resorts India are looking for an experienced Reservation Manager based out of Kanpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Aman Resorts India:
Aman Resorts India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Travel Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aman Resorts India!
